/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 1203,4A MOTION/NP/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT GRANTS MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,4A,/X:THE COURT MAKES A FINDING AND GRANTS MOTION PURSUANT TO PC  1203,4A  IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE,/X:PURSUANT TO SIGNED AND FILED ORDER GUILTY PLEA IS SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,/X:ORDER FOR DISMISSAL SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/
